946c09b786b0441f8b34da37ee8f5722.description:
User Features
User Registration & Login (Email, Google, OTP)
Profile Management (name, address, orders)
Product Browsing (categories, filters, search)
Product Details Page (images, price, description, reviews)
Add to Cart / Remove from Cart
Wishlist
Checkout System
Order Tracking
Reviews & Ratings
🛍️ Product Features
Product Listing (title, price, images, stock)
Categories & Subcategories
Filters (price, brand, rating)
Search functionality (important for UX)
💳 Payment Features
Multiple Payment Options:
UPI
Credit/Debit Card
Net Banking
Cash on Delivery (COD)
Payment Gateway Integration (like Razorpay, Stripe)
📦 Order Management
Place Order
Cancel / Return Order
Order History
Invoice Generation
🧑‍💼 Admin Panel
Dashboard (sales, users, analytics)
Manage Products (Add/Edit/Delete)
Manage Orders
Manage Users
Manage Coupons & Discounts
